title: Indulgent Bitter Ukrainian Sweet Potatoes Gratin
description: A rich and flavorful Ukrainian-inspired dish featuring sweet potatoes, confit tomatoes, and a blend of spices, perfect for a special occasion. This Whole30-friendly recipe is both bitter and tender, with a satisfying crunch from the topping.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced sweet potatoes and onions.
In a separate bowl, mix together the confit tomatoes, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with the duck fat.
Create a layer of sweet potatoes and onions in the baking dish.
Spread half of the confit tomato mixture over the sweet potatoes.
Repeat the layers, starting with the sweet potatoes and onions, then the remaining confit tomato mixture.
Top the gratin with the chopped parsley.
Bake the gratin in the preheated oven for 45 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown.
Remove the gratin from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
